title: Keraselma rubrum
intro: Keraselma rubrum, also known as Rubia, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Keraselma rubrum include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been associated with its potential use in treating conditions such as arthritis and certain types of cancer. The bioactive constituents of this plant include anthraquinones, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Keraselma rubrum include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to support joint health, improve digestion, and promote overall well-being.
preparations: Unfortunately, I do not have information about herbal preparations of Keraselma rubrum.
